---
title: "graph processing"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

[Overview of new nimbleModel](overview.html)

[Implementation](implementation.html)

[Graph relationships](graph_relationships.html)

<!-- [Overall strategy](overall_strategy.html) -->

[Index inversion](index_inversion.html)

[Topological sorting](topo_sorting.html)

[Calculation processing](calculation_processing.html)

[Combining ranges](combining_ranges.html)

Todos (completely incomplete):

- graphRules need to be augmented to deal with scalar and block constants and with missing values.

- generate downstreamRules, upstreamRules, and originalIndexRules in modelDef processing

- add varRange of LHS for each declaration

- topological sorting to produce sortID for each variable

- develop calcRule code and use for calcRules for each variable

- develop code to produce calcRanges given a varRange and a calcRule
